description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a combination of flat and gable roofs, set within a neatly landscaped yard. The front facade includes a prominent entryway, a small porch area, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The exterior is primarily finished in white, with contrasting dark gray roofing and subtle wooden accents near the windows. The property is bordered by a low hedge and a white fence, with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. Mature trees and a well-maintained lawn enhance the curb appeal, while the rear of the house includes a covered patio or secondary entrance. The overall structure is compact yet spacious, with a clear emphasis on clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern white bungalow with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, and landscaped yard with trees, driveway, and a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, two large trees, and a paved driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the gable roof, extended driveway, fenced backyard, and a covered patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, white fence enclosure, and a small covered patio or secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the flat and gable roof sections, lawn, and trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
